mxlibrary: [{"xml":"<mxGraphModel><root><mxCell id=\"0\"/><mxCell id=\"1\" parent=\"0\"/><mxCell id=\"2\" value=\"icon-service-Azure-Monitors-for-SAP-Solutions\" style=\"shape=image;verticalLabelPosition=bottom;verticalAlign=top;imageAspect=0;aspect=fixed;image=data:image/svg+xml;base64,\" vertex=\"1\" parent=\"1\"><mxGeometry width=\"48\" height=\"48\" as=\"geometry\"/></mxCell></root></mxGraphModel>","w":48,"h":48,"title":"icon-service-Azure-Monitors-for-SAP-Solutions"},{"xml":"<mxGraphModel><root><mxCell id=\"0\"/><mxCell id=\"1\" parent=\"0\"/><mxCell id=\"2\" value=\"icon-service-Network-Watcher\" style=\"shape=image;verticalLabelPosition=bottom;verticalAlign=top;imageAspect=0;aspect=fixed;image=data:image/svg+xml;base64,\" vertex=\"1\" parent=\"1\"><mxGeometry width=\"48\" height=\"48\" as=\"geometry\"/></mxCell></root></mxGraphModel>","w":48,"h":48,"title":"icon-service-Network-Watcher"},{"xml":"<mxGraphModel><root><mxCell id=\"0\"/><mxCell id=\"1\" parent=\"0\"/><mxCell id=\"2\" value=\"icon-service-Auto-Scale\" style=\"shape=image;verticalLabelPosition=bottom;verticalAlign=top;imageAspect=0;aspect=fixed;image=data:image/svg+xml;base64,\" vertex=\"1\" parent=\"1\"><mxGeometry width=\"48\" height=\"48\" as=\"geometry\"/></mxCell></root></mxGraphModel>","w":48,"h":48,"title":"icon-service-Auto-Scale"}]
